title: [LowerToHW] Implicit Always Block merging should merge down, not up

features.name: procedural_stop_with_external_condition_wire
features.description: Code should include a procedural stop statement whose condition depends on a wire assigned outside the always block
features.snippet: always @(posedge clock) begin if (STOP_COND_ & _T) $fatal; end assign _T = a2 | a3;
